name: Chocolate Dessert Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and chocolate in a bowl.
2. Set the bowl over hot water and stir until melted.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in the sugar until dissolved.
5. Gradually stir in the salt and cream.
6. Return to heat and continue stirring until thoroughly blended.
7. Remove from heat.
8. Stir in the vanilla extract.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
